situational_context: Running comeback week 5+: 8 runs completed since May 3 gap break (182 days off). Progressed from 2-3 km to consistent 5+ km at Z2. Run #8 today: 5.56 km, HR 138, suffer 26. HRV recovering after 4-day dip (28-31-33-36) post-Run #7 — consistent with normal post-exercise recovery, not overtraining. VO2max running improved to 40.3 (+2.0 since comeback start at 38.3). Chronic load declining to 16.18 due to 28d window shift — earlier higher-load periods have fallen off, not actual detraining. ACWR 1.19 — within safe band but on the higher side. Weight 102.62 kg (down 1.48 kg in 3 weeks, fat 26.8%). Primary cross-training: e-bike commuting on sur site days (~38 km round trip). Young baby (Leonie, ~5 months) occasionally fragments sleep but not currently a major bottleneck. No new labs since Dec 2025. Vitamin D retest due ~July 2026.

recommendations.text: Continue running comeback at 5 km plateau — maintain 2-3 runs/week at Z2, max 5.5 km, spacing >=48h between runs. Do not increase to 6 km until 3 consecutive runs at 5+ km completed pain-free with HR staying in 130-137 target.
recommendations.measurable: Run #9 and #10 completed this week at 5-5.5 km, avg HR <=137, no post-run pain >24h

recommendations.text: Prioritize sleep >7h to support HRV recovery. The 4-day HRV dip (28-33 range, Jun 4-6) is recovering but signals marginal recovery capacity. Target >=7.5h on non-sur-site nights.
recommendations.measurable: HRV weekly avg stabilizes at >=34, sleep 7d avg >7.2h by next digest

recommendations.text: Increase daily protein intake — 7d avg is 138g vs 150g target. Jun 6 was critically low at 85g. At 102.6 kg during running comeback, adequate protein is essential for tendon and muscle tissue adaptation.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Alert if drops below 32 for 3+ consecutive days
markers_to_watch.reason: Currently 34, recovering from 4-day dip. Further decline below 32 would indicate recovery capacity exceeded — swap a run for cycling or rest.
Currently 1.19 — within safe band but elevated. Chronic denominator is very low (16.18) making the ratio sensitive to any acute spike.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Target stabilization above 16 and gradual increase toward 20+ over next 2 weeks
markers_to_watch.reason: Dropped from 22.3 (May 14) to 16.18 (Jun 7) as the 28d window shifted. Consistent sessions this week should stabilize it.

markers_to_watch.threshold: Any localized joint/tendon pain lasting >24h after a run
markers_to_watch.reason: Tissue tolerance remains the bottleneck at 102.6 kg. Pain signals trigger immediate skip of next run per return-to-running protocol.
